title: The Alchemist
description: A tale about following your dreams, The Alchemist tells the story of a young shepherd named Santiago who seeks treasure in Egypt.

title: The White Tiger
description: A gripping story of class struggle in modern India, narrated by a man who rises from poor beginnings to become a successful entrepreneur.

title: 2 States
description: A story about a couple from different cultural backgrounds who struggle to convince their families to accept their love.

title: Rich Dad Poor Dad
description: A personal finance classic that contrasts the financial philosophies of the author's two 'dads'—his biological father and his best friend's father.

title: The Kite Runner
description: A powerful story of friendship and redemption set against the backdrop of a changing Afghanistan.

title: The Subtle Art of Not Giving a F*ck
description: A counterintuitive approach to living a good life, emphasizing the importance of choosing what to care about.

title: Midnight's Children
description: A magical realist novel that intertwines the life of its protagonist with the history of India, exploring identity and nationalism.

title: The God of Small Things
description: A poignant tale of love and loss in Kerala, narrated through the eyes of fraternal twins and their family’s tragic history.

title: A Suitable Boy
description: A sprawling novel about family and love in post-independence India, centered around the quest to find a suitable match for a young girl.

title: When a Moth Meets a Flame
description: A romantic thriller that delves into the complexities of love, betrayal, and the consequences of choices made.

title: One Indian Girl
description: A story that tackles the expectations placed on women in Indian society through the eyes of a successful young woman.

title: The 5 AM Club
description: A revolutionary method to wake up early and maximize productivity, success, and personal growth.

title: The Silent Patient
description: A psychological thriller about a woman who shoots her husband and then stops speaking, unraveling a gripping mystery.

title: The Power of Now
description: A guide to spiritual enlightenment that emphasizes living in the present moment.

title: The Night Circus
description: A mesmerizing tale of a magical competition between two young illusionists at a mysterious circus that appears only at night.

title: The Dutch House
description: A rich family saga that explores themes of love, loss, and the ties that bind us to our past.

title: Educated
description: A memoir about a woman who grows up in a strict and abusive household in rural Idaho and eventually escapes to learn about the wider world through education.

title: The Girl on the Train
description: A psychological thriller that follows a woman who becomes entangled in a missing persons investigation that unveils dark secrets.

title: To Kill a Mockingbird
description: A classic novel about racial injustice and moral growth in the American South, told through the eyes of a young girl.

title: Becoming
description: A deeply personal memoir by the former First Lady of the United States, sharing her experiences and insights.

title: Pride and Prejudice
description: A romantic novel that critiques the British landed gentry at the end of the 18th century, focusing on the turbulent relationship between Elizabeth Bennet and Mr. Darcy.

title: The Midnight Library
description: A novel about choices and regrets, exploring the infinite possibilities of life through the lens of a magical library.

title: The Henna Artist
description: A richly drawn story of love, betrayal, and the journey of a woman finding her place in the world in post-independence India.
